code:
# Write your MySQL query statement below
SELECT
    s.product_id,
    s.year AS first_year,
    s.quantity,
    s.price
FROM Sales s
JOIN (
    SELECT
        product_id,
        MIN(year) AS first_year
    FROM Sales
    GROUP BY product_id
) f
ON s.product_id = f.product_id
AND s.year = f.first_year;
